user.title: Ozon Package Tracker
user.description: Track Ozon marketplace packages via tracking.ozon.ru. Packages are added later with the ozon_package_tracker.add_tracking service or from the bundled Lovelace card.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is allowed.

data_description.cookie: If updates fail with HTTP 403, open tracking.ozon.ru in your browser, copy the 'cookie' request header from DevTools (Network tab) and paste it here.

remove_tracking.name: Remove tracking
remove_tracking.description: Stop tracking a package by tracking number or by entity.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Refresh tracking data for all packages now.
